welcomeDescription: The ultimate marriage-focused dating application designed for everyone. With Spoused, you have the ticket to meaningful connections that will last a lifetime!
whyChooseDescription: Spoused is a marriage-focused application for everyone, regardless of ethnicity, religion, or even identification as part of the LGBTQ+ community. No matter your story, you're welcome at Spoused. We're dedicated to helping you find your dream spouse, no matter where you are in the world!
firstMoveDescription: Join us to connect, chat, and find meaningful connections by being the one who sparks the start of something beautiful.
takeAdvantageTitle: Take Advantage of Spoused’s Amazing Features

features.title: Unlimited Swiping
features.description: We don’t put a limit on how many potential partners you can find. Swipe to your heart’s content and discover your soulmate!

features.title: Travel Mode
features.description: Stay open to love even on the go. Discover available partners while you explore uncharted territory. Interested in potential partners outside of your location? Use our Passport Location to discover matches across the world.

features.title: Filter Preferences
features.description: Specialize your search with custom profile selections to find your perfect match.

features.title: Rewind
features.description: Change your mind? No worries! Use our Rewind feature to undo a pairing quickly and quietly.

features.title: Rematch
features.description: At Spoused, we believe that timing is everything. Reconnect with past connections with ease on our application.

features.title: Boost
features.description: Your profile will be highlighted and shown to more people.

features.title: Messages Before Matching
features.description: Test the connection by sending a message to spark a conversation before you officially connect.

features.title: Video Call With Your Matches
features.description: Enjoy embedded video calls on our app to chat with your muse.

coreValuesDescription: At Spoused, we are guided by our core values

coreValues.title: The Power of Marriage
coreValues.description: Marriage is a powerful relationship that every individual should have the ability to experience.

coreValues.title: Inclusivity for All
coreValues.description: We welcome everyone, regardless of background or orientation, ensuring a safe space to find love.

coreValues.title: Reinventing Love
coreValues.description: Spoused can reinvent love and make marriage alluring for our global audience again.

coreValues.title: Commitment Matters
coreValues.description: Loyalty and openness are at our core. We believe in the power of commitments that will last a lifetime.

downloadDescription: Spoused is free to download and free to use! Are you ready to rediscover love and find the partner of your dreams? Find love today!
aboutUsDescription: At Spoused, we are more than just a dating app—we're your dedicated partner in finding lasting love and lifelong commitment. With inclusivity at our core, we're redefining how people approach relationships.
visionDescription: Our vision is simple yet powerful: to make marriage accessible and exciting for everyone, transcending the boundaries of ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, and location. We believe that love knows no bounds. We are here to ensure you have the tools to discover your forever partner.
whyChooseUsDescription: There are so many dating apps, but Spoused is different. We offer you access to a world of meaningful connections. Whether you're searching for your soulmate, a partner for your adventures, or a companion to share your journey, our marriage-focused approach and other features set us apart.
inclusiveByDesignDescription: Spoused is proud to be an inclusive platform where all love is celebrated. Our app is a safe space where straight and LGBTQ+ individuals can connect authentically. Regardless of who you are or where you’re from, Spoused welcomes you with open arms.
featuresThatMatterDescription: With Spoused, you’re in control of your love story. Enjoy features like Unlimited Swiping, Travel Mode for global connections, customized filters, Rewind for second chances, and the option to Compliment Before Matching.
ourCommitmentDescription: Spoused stands against superficial connections and empty conversations. We prioritize commitment, loyalty, and genuine interactions. We're not all about the swipes but about building sustainable futures.
joinCommunityDescription: Diversity is what makes Spoused thrive. Every ethnicity, religion, and background adds to our application's rich tapestry of love stories. Together, let's make the dating landscape exciting and inclusive for all.
downloadDescription2: Get started on your journey to lasting love today. Download Spoused for free and unlock a world of possibilities. Your future love awaits.

faq.question: What is Spoused, and why is it different from other dating apps?
faq.answer: Spoused is a marriage-focused dating app to help you find your lifelong partner. Unlike dating apps, we prioritize meaningful connections, inclusivity, and commitment, making us your go-to platform for serious, long-lasting relationships.

faq.question: Is Spoused free to use? Is there a subscription fee?
faq.answer: Spoused is entirely free to download and use. There are no subscription fees or recurring costs. We believe that finding love should be accessible to everyone, so Spoused remains affordable and accessible to all.

faq.question: How does Travel Mode work?
faq.answer: Travel Mode allows you to indicate your openness to connections no matter where you are in the world. It's perfect for those who want to explore global romantic connections or connect while on the move or exploring other parts of the world.

faq.question: Who does Spoused serve? How is the application inclusive?
faq.answer: Spoused seeks to serve all individuals, regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, background, or orientation. Inclusivity is one of our core values. We ensure that everyone has the opportunity to find love on our platform.

faq.question: I matched with someone, but I have changed my mind. Can I undo a match on Spoused?
faq.answer: Yes! We have a feature called Rewind that you can use to undo a match. It's easy to use and can help you undo a match if you change your mind or make a mistake while swiping.

faq.question: What is Rematch, and how does this work?
faq.answer: Rematch is one of our most important features. This feature allows you to reconnect with a previous pairing that you may have missed or want to rekindle after some time. Timing is everything, and if you feel that your last match should be revisited, Rematch can ensure this happens for you!

faq.question: Can I send a message before I match with someone on Spoused?
faq.answer: Of course! With our Compliment Before Matching feature, you can make the first move and initiate a conversation with someone before even matching with them. This makes it easier to break the ice to see if there is a connection between you and your potential partner.

faq.question: Is Spoused available worldwide?
faq.answer: Spoused is available worldwide, not just limited to your location. With our Passport Location feature, you can find matches from all over the world! This broadens your horizons and increases your chances of finding love.

faq.question: Are there any restrictions on who can join Spoused?
faq.answer: Our only restriction is that you must be 18 years or older to join. Besides that, we welcome everyone, regardless of orientation, identity, religion, or ethnicity. Our diverse community makes us unique, and we want you to be part of it!

faq.question: I don’t see my question here and/or I have an issue. How can I contact Spoused customer support?
faq.answer: You can contact our dedicated customer support team anytime on our app or through our website. We're here to assist you with any questions or concerns.

contactUsDescription: At Spoused, we value your feedback and questions. Whether you need assistance, have suggestions, or want to reach out, we're here for you! Contact our dedicated support team through the app or visit our website. Once you submit a request, we will respond promptly to ensure your Spoused experience is exceptional and uninterrupted.
aboutOurAppDescription: Spoused is a marriage-focused app focused on helping you find genuine, lasting love. Unlike typical dating apps, we prioritize meaningful connections and inclusivity, ensuring that marriage is accessible to all, regardless of their background or orientation.
whatMakesSpousedDifferent: What Makes Spoused Different from Other Dating Apps
UnlikeOtherApp: Unlike other dating apps, we are focused on offering a dating solution for everyone. Here’s why we are different from others.
